compassion-hud.config.title: Compassion HUD Settings
compassion-hud.config.bar_width.desc:
Changes the width of the compass.
Pixels * GUI scale
Default is 200
compassion-hud.config.text_color.desc:
Changes the color of the direction indicators.
8-Digit hex code
Default is FFFFFFFF
compassion-hud.config.degrees_shown.desc:
Changes the range of angles shown in the compass.
Degrees
Default is 90°
compassion-hud.config.tick_step.desc:
Changes the angle between the vertical lines.
Degrees
Default is 11.25°
compassion-hud.config.hide_on_debug.desc:
Toggles whether the compass is visible while in the debug (F3) mode.
Default is True
compassion-hud.config.coordinate_positio:
Changes the position of the coordinate readout.
Default is Top-left corner
